25667:
All I can do is watch
The shattered fragments of reality
31283:
Grasping at open air
The ground is stolen from beneath my feet
36300:
(The pure white light weighin' heavy on my mind) Surrounded!
(Inspirations, expectations, piled too high) By darkness...
(Kick 'em all down and climb the rubble to the top) Unbalanced!
(And then I'll be the burning star that no one can stop)
48117:
Everything is a blur
I can't distinguish myself from the mirage
53750:
But wavering in the distance
I see a faint spark flickering to life
59300:
A flare of hope ignites
The future I lost in the dust comes back into sight
64800:
The heat washes over me
I feel my senses burning...
70583:
Clawing my way through the shaded labyrinth
Each turn leads me deeper yet
80417:
Ah, I don't care if I don't reach the end
I'll keep reaching for you
88067:
Like fire to a fuse,
Blinding light runs the darkness through
92850:
Why can't I hold the rush back?
I feel so alive, the inferno roars inside
99350:
Screaming out all my fears
I'll show them that I was here
104267: The smouldering embers of my soul are proof enough that I won.
109417:
(The pure white light weighin' heavy on my mind) Surrounded!
(Inspirations, expectations, piled too high) By glory...
(Kick 'em all down and climb the rubble to the top) Unchallenged!
(And then I'll be the burning star that no one can stop)
